project.title: Skyfall Mage2
project.description: A non-commercial WebGPU action RPG prototype focused on material-field combat, responsive UI, and deterministic gameplay systems.

posts.title: V2 Material Field Slice
posts.text: Responsive game UI, WebGPU field rendering, CPU material reactions, save/load, progression, shop, skill, and fusion systems are now wired into the playable prototype.
